hero.title: Innovation Lab
hero.description: Nyochaa ngosi mmekọrịta, nnwale, na ihe ngosi teknụzụ sitere na ndị otu injinia anyị.

hero.title: Innovation Lab
hero.description: Anyị na-enyocha ókèala bara uru na AI, akpaaka, na sistemụ nkesa, wee sụgharịa nyocha a kwadoro n'ime ikike mmepụta a pụrụ ịdabere na ya.

researchAreas.title: Mpaghara nyocha
researchAreas.description: Mpaghara ọ bụla na-elekwasị anya na-ejikọta nyocha nyocha na ụzọ mmejuputa atumatu maka usoro ụwa n'ezie.

detailedFocusBriefs.title: Nkọwa zuru ezu na-elekwasị anya
detailedFocusBriefs.description: Atụmatụ nyocha dị nso na-aga ugbu a site na nkwenye ụkpụrụ ụlọ gaa na atụmatụ nnyefe.

fromLabToProduction.title: Site na ụlọ nyocha ruo mmepụta
fromLabToProduction.description: A na-atụle ihe ọhụrụ na Horizon site na nsonaazụ mbupu, ọ bụghị prototypes dịpụrụ adịpụ.

roadmap.title: R &D Roadmap
roadmap.description: Ọganihu na-aga n'ihu site na iwulite ikike gaa na usoro na-agbanwe agbanwe, na-aga n'ihu na-emeziwanye usoro.

publications.title: Mbipụta na nghọta
publications.description: Ederede teknụzụ na mmejuputa iwu sitere na ọrụ ọhụụ na-aga n'ihu.

appliedAi.title: Applied AI Systems
appliedAi.description: Mmepụta-lekwasịrị anya AI architectures na-ekpuchi nlereanya na-eje ozi, atụmatụ orchestration, na nnwale na-achịkwa.

automationFrameworks.title: Usoro akpaaka
automationFrameworks.description: Ngwá ọrụ akpaaka dị n'ime maka nchekwa nnyefe, nzaghachi ihe merenụ, na arụmọrụ injinia na-emegharị ugboro ugboro.

advancedArchitecture.title: Advanced Architecture Experimentation
advancedArchitecture.description: Nnyocha banyere ihe owuwu na-agbanwe agbanwe, nke a na-ekesa kachasị maka arụmọrụ, ndidi mmejọ, na ọnụ ọgụgụ.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Ọgụgụ isi na nsọtụ maka mkpebi latency dị ala, nhazi telemetry, na nhazi ụgbọ mmiri ngwaọrụ.

nlp.title: Nhazi asụsụ okike
nlp.description: Pipelines nghọta ọtụtụ asụsụ maka nhazi, mmịpụta, ntụgharị, na usoro mkparịta ụka.

evolutionaryAlgorithms.title: Evolutionary algọridim na njikarịcha
evolutionaryAlgorithms.description: Usoro ọchụchọ na njikarịcha sitere n'ike mmụọ nsọ site na nhọrọ okike iji dozie nsogbu injinia dị elu.

automationFrameworks.title: Usoro akpaaka
automationFrameworks.description: Anyị na-ewu composable workflow frameworks maka ntọhapụ orchestration, àgwà ọnụ ụzọ, na post-nyefee nkwenye iji belata ntuziaka esemokwu mgbe mma pụrụ ịdabere na ya.

advancedArchitecture.title: Advanced Architecture Experimentation
advancedArchitecture.description: Nnwale ụkpụrụ ụlọ anyị na-elekwasị anya na usoro mmebi ọrụ, usoro nkwụsi ike mpaghara, na envelopu arụmọrụ maka sistemụ na-arụ ọrụ n'okpuru ọchịchọ na-agbanwe agbanwe.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Anyị na-akwado ihe omume na atụmatụ inference nke na-eme ka mkpebi mpaghara ngwa ngwa ma na-echekwa njikwa etiti, nyocha, na nlereanya ndụ.

adaptiveCapacityPlanning.title: Atụmatụ ikike na-agbanwe agbanwe
adaptiveCapacityPlanning.description: A na-akwado prototypes ụlọ nyocha megide ọrụ simulated wee jikọta ya na usoro ikpo okwu.

operationalIntelligence.title: Ọgụgụ isi arụmọrụ
operationalIntelligence.description: Pipelines NLP na-esi na nnwale a na-achịkwa gaa na arụmọrụ nkwado mmepụta maka nyocha ngwa ngwa na nghọta doro anya.

optimizationInDeliverySystems.title: Njikarịcha na sistemụ nnyefe
optimizationInDeliverySystems.description: A na-atụgharị usoro evolushọn a nwalere na ụlọ nyocha n'ime injin njikarịcha maka nhazi na nkesa.

edgeDecisioning.title: Mkpebi Edge
edgeDecisioning.description: A na-eme ka nnwale IoT na nkwụsịtụ na-eme ka ọ bụrụ ọrụ dị ala na ntụkwasị obi siri ike.

now.title: Ntọala AI etinyere
now.description: Gbasaa ndebiri ndị na-eje ozi nlereanya, ụlọ nyocha nyocha, na ụkpụrụ nlebara anya n'ofe ndị otu ngwaahịa.

next.title: Autonomous Engineering Workflows
next.description: Arụ ọrụ akpaaka nke na-ebelata ihe ize ndụ nke ntinye ma belata loops nzaghachi maka mbupu.

twelveToEighteenMonths.title: Edge-Native ọgụgụ isi
twelveToEighteenMonths.description: Scale ngwakọ ígwé ojii-onu architectures maka nso ezigbo oge inference na latency-sensitive gburugburu.

longHorizon.title: Sistemụ njikarịcha na-aga n'ihu
longHorizon.description: Jikọọ nnwale, nlekota oru, na njikarịcha ka usoro wee nwee ike imeghari n'enweghị nsogbu ka ọnọdụ na-agbanwe.

aiReliability.title: Engineering AI Systems nke na-anọgide na-enwe ntụkwasị obi na mmepụta
aiReliability.summary: Echiche bara uru maka ịhazi ọsọ nnwale na ọchịchị mmepụta.

distributedArchitecturePatterns.title: Nkesa Architecture Patterns maka High-Growth Platforms
distributedArchitecturePatterns.summary: Ndetu ubi sitere na nnwale ụkpụrụ ụlọ lekwasịrị anya na arụmọrụ, nkwụsi ike, na ịdị mfe arụmọrụ.

roadmappingAppliedRd.title: Roadmapping etinyere R&D maka Nsonaazụ Azụmahịa
roadmappingAppliedRd.summary: Otu anyị si ahazi atụmatụ ọhụụ ka nchọpụta wee si na prototype gaa na uru a pụrụ ịtụle.

cta.title: Wuo na Horizon Innovation Lab
cta.description: Soro anyị rụọ ọrụ iji kwado echiche dị oke egwu ngwa ngwa ma kwaga echiche egosipụtara n'ime usoro mmepụta dị nchebe.

hero.title: Applied AI Systems
hero.description: Nchịkọta bara uru banyere otu Horizon si emepụta, na-ebugharị, ma na-arụ ọrụ usoro mmụta igwe site na prototype ruo na mmepụta.

machineLearningPipelines.title: Pipelines mmụta igwe
machineLearningPipelines.description: Mmepụta AI na-amalite site na pipelines na-emegharị emegharị nke na-ejikọ data, nnwale, nkwenye, na nzaghachi.

modelDeploymentPatterns.title: Model Deployment Patterns
modelDeploymentPatterns.description: A na-ahọrọ usoro ntinye dabere na mkpa latency, nkatọ azụmahịa, na mgbagwoju anya arụmọrụ.

mlopsOperatingModel.title: MLOps na-arụ ọrụ nlereanya
mlopsOperatingModel.description: Omume MLOps na-eme ka usoro AI na-anọgide na-enwe ntụkwasị obi, na-achịkwa, ma na-agbanwe agbanwe ka ojiji na-etolite.

monitoringAndReliability.title: Nlekota oru na ntụkwasị obi
monitoringAndReliability.description: Observability na-emechi loop n'etiti omume nlereanya na nsonaazụ arụmọrụ.

dataAndFeatureEngineering.title: Data na Feature Engineering
dataAndFeatureEngineering.description: Ntinye data nsụgharị, nyocha dị mma, na nkọwa njirimara ndị a na-emegharị emepụta ntọala a pụrụ ịdabere na ya maka ọzụzụ nlereanya.

modelDevelopment.title: Model Development
modelDevelopment.description: A na-enyocha nnwale na nhazi ndị a na-emegharị emegharị, metrik ebumnuche, na ntọala ntụnyere akpaaka.

validationAndSafetyGates.title: Nkwenye na ọnụ ụzọ nchekwa
validationAndSafetyGates.description: Ụdị ndị na-aga ime gafere arụmọrụ, ike, na nyocha iwu tupu a kwado ha maka ntọhapụ.

operationalFeedbackLoops.title: Mmeghachi omume Loops
operationalFeedbackLoops.description: Post-deployment telemetry na-agwa retraining ebumnuche, rollback mkpebi, na ọzọ iteration atụmatụ.

realTimeInferenceServices.title: Real-Time Inference Services
realTimeInferenceServices.description: Low-latency APIs maka ngwa mmekọrịta na autoscaling, caching, na arịrịọ-larịị observability.

batchAndStreamingPredictions.title: Ogbe na Gụgharia Amụma
batchAndStreamingPredictions.description: Ndokwa na ihe omume maka akara dị elu gafee nchịkọta na arụmọrụ arụmọrụ.

edgeAwareDeployment.title: Edge-Aware Deployment
edgeAwareDeployment.description: Hybrid ígwé ojii-onu na-eje ozi nakawa etu esi maka gburugburu ebe obibi na-achọ mpaghara inference na centralized nlereanya ọchịchị.

ciCdForModels.title: CI / CD maka ụdị
ciCdForModels.description: Akpaghị aka na-ewu, nwalee, na ịhapụ workflows na-ebelata ihe ize ndụ nnyefe mgbe ị na-echekwa ọsọ nnyefe.

modelRegistryAndLifecycle.title: Model ndekọ na Lifecycle
modelRegistryAndLifecycle.description: Versioned nlereanya artifacts na nkwalite nkebi, lineage, na ihu ọma workflows melite akara na traceability.

servingInfrastructure.title: Na-eje ozi akụrụngwa
servingInfrastructure.description: Scalable na-eje ozi n'ígwé na rollout azum dị ka canary na onyinyo deployments na-akwado mma mgbanwe management.

monitoringPillars.latencyThroughputAndCostEfficiencyTracki: Latency, throughput, na na-eri oru oma nsuso
monitoringPillars.dataQualityRegressionAlertsAndRemediatio: Data quality regression alerts na remediation workflows
monitoringPillars.auditabilityForComplianceAndIncidentAnal: Auditability maka nnabata na nyocha ihe omume

cta.title: Scale etinyere AI na ntụkwasị obi
cta.description: Ọ bụrụ na ị na-eme atụmatụ atụmatụ AI nke chọrọ nsonaazụ a pụrụ ịtụle na ịnọgide na-enwe ogologo oge, Horizon nwere ike inye aka chepụta ma rụọ ọrụ usoro ndụ usoro zuru oke.

hero.title: NLP dị iche iche
hero.description: Nyochaa ikike nhazi asụsụ eke bara uru na otu ha si abanye n'ime usoro mmepụta asụsụ a pụrụ ịdabere na ya.

foundations.title: NLP Ntọala
foundations.description: Nhazi asụsụ sitere n'okike na-ejikọta akara asụsụ na mmụta igwe iji wepụ ihe ọ pụtara, ebumnuche, na usoro site na ederede.

workbench.title: Mmekọrịta NLP Workbench
workbench.description: Jiri ngosi iji nwalee nchọpụta asụsụ, akara mmetụta, mmịpụta ihe, na omume ntụgharị na ezigbo oge.

productionApplications.title: Olee otú Horizon si etinye NLP na mmepụta
productionApplications.description: A na-ejikọta ikike NLP n'ime ọrụ azụmahịa na nchebe arụmọrụ na metrik doro anya.

reliabilityAndGovernance.title: Ntụkwasị obi na Ụkpụrụ Ọchịchị
reliabilityAndGovernance.description: Mmepụta NLP chọrọ ihe karịrị ogo nlereanya; Ọ na-adabere na usoro nchebe na nkwenye na-aga n'ihu.

foundations.intro1: Usoro NLP nke oge a na-akwado akpaaka, mkpa ọchụchọ, mmịpụta ihe ọmụma, na mmekorita ọtụtụ asụsụ. Mmejuputa iwu dị irè chọrọ ma ogo nlereanya na njikwa arụmọrụ siri ike.
foundations.intro2: Na Horizon, anyị na-elekwasị anya na sistemụ NLP na-agwụ agwụ nke na-ejikọta nghọta siri ike na nlereanya, ọchịchị, na mmetụta mmepụta a pụrụ ịtụle.

languageDetection.title: Nchọpụta asụsụ
languageDetection.description: Na-achọpụta asụsụ site na akụkụ ederede dị mkpirikpi ma ọ bụ ogologo iji mee ka arịrịọ banye na pipeline nhazi ziri ezi.

sentimentAnalysis.title: Mmetụta Analysis
sentimentAnalysis.description: Na-ewepụta ebumnuche mmetụta uche na polarity maka ọgụgụ isi ndị ahịa, nkwado nhazi, na nzaghachi ngwaahịa.

entityExtraction.title: Entity mmịpụta
entityExtraction.description: Na-achọpụta ihe ndị a haziri ahazi dị ka aha, ụlọ ọrụ, ọnọdụ, na ụbọchị site na ederede ederede.

translation.title: Nsụgharị
translation.description: Na-akwado ọtụtụ ọrụ site na ịsụgharị ederede onye ọrụ ma ọ bụ arụmọrụ mgbe ị na-ejigide ọnọdụ.

supportAndTicketIntelligence.title: Nkwado na ọgụgụ isi tiketi
supportAndTicketIntelligence.description: Kọwaa arịrịọ ndị na-abata site na ngwa ngwa, ebumnuche, na mmetụta iji mee ka usoro na nzaghachi dị ngwa.

governedContentOperations.title: Ọrụ ọdịnaya na-achịkwa
governedContentOperations.description: Tinye ihe nzacha asụsụ na nyocha imeru ihe n'ókè na ebumnuche ncheta.

textDrivenBusinessInsights.title: Nghọta azụmahịa ederede
textDrivenBusinessInsights.description: Chịkọta usoro sitere na akwụkwọ, nyocha, na nkwukọrịta iji kọwaa atụmatụ na mkpebi arụmọrụ.

evaluationByUseCase.title: Nyocha site n'iji ikpe
evaluationByUseCase.description: A na-atụle ụdị ndị a na ngalaba datasets tupu e mee mkpebi ntọhapụ.

humanInTheLoopSafeguards.title: Nchebe ndị mmadụ
humanInTheLoopSafeguards.description: Amụma dị elu gụnyere ụzọ nyocha, iwu mmụba, na akara ntụkwasị obi doro anya.

continuousMonitoring.title: Nlekota na-aga n'ihu
continuousMonitoring.description: Drift, latency, na àgwà mmebi na-nọgidere na-aga n'ihu otú retraining na rollback bụ proactive.

hero.title: Genetic Algorithm Simulation
hero.description: Nyochaa mgbakọ evolushọn na gburugburu ebe obibi mmekọrịta ma hụ otu ụkpụrụ ahụ si sụgharịa na sistemụ njikarịcha mmepụta.

scientificFoundation.title: Ntọala sayensị
scientificFoundation.description: Algọridim mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa bụ usoro njikarịcha nke ndị mmadụ sitere n'ike mmụọ nsọ site na nhọrọ okike na mgbanwe.

interactiveEnvironment.title: Mmekọrịta evolushọn gburugburu ebe obibi
interactiveEnvironment.description: Na-agba ọsọ ịme anwansị iji hụ ahụike ka mma ọgbọ site n'ọgbọ ma hụ etu nrụgide nhọrọ si emetụta nsonaazụ.

productionUse.title: Olee otú Horizon si eji nke a na mmepụta
productionUse.description: Otu usoro ọchụchọ a na-eji eme ihe ngosi a na-eme ka pipeline njikarịcha etinyere na sistemụ arụmọrụ.

applicationDomains.title: Ngalaba usoroiheomume sara mbara
applicationDomains.description: Njikarịcha evolushọn bara uru karịsịa na sistemụ nwere ebumnuche siri ike na ihe mgbochi na-emegiderịta onwe ha.

scientificFoundation.intro1: Kama ịchọ otu ihe ngwọta n'otu oge, mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa algọridim na-agbanwe ọnụ ọgụgụ dị iche iche nke ndị na-aga ime. A na-enyocha ọgbọ ọ bụla megide ọrụ ahụike ma nụchaa site na nhọrọ, crossover, na mgbanwe.
scientificFoundation.intro2: Nke a na-eme ka ha dị irè maka nsogbu dị elu na ihe mgbochi ndị na-abụghị nke na-abụghị nke na-adịghị mma, ebe usoro deterministic na-aghọ ihe na-emebi emebi ma ọ bụ dị oke ọnụ.

selection.title: Nhọrọ
selection.description: Ndị na-eme ihe nkiri dị elu nwere ike ịlanarị ma metụta ọgbọ na-esote.

crossover.title: Crossover
crossover.description: A na-ejikọta àgwà siri ike iji mepụta ihe ngwọta ọhụrụ nwere ike agwakọta.

mutation.title: Mgbanwe
mutation.description: A na-achịkwa randomness na-ewebata iche iche ka ọchụchọ ghara ịkwụsị gburugburu mpaghara optima.

convergence.title: Njikọ
convergence.description: N'ime ọtụtụ ọgbọ, ndị mmadụ na-aga n'ihu na ngwọta kwụsiri ike, nke dị elu.

resourceScheduling.title: Usoro ihe onwunwe
resourceScheduling.description: Anyị na-eji usoro evolushọn iji bulie usoro ihe omume dị iche iche ebe ọchụchọ ike na-agaghị ekwe omume.

architectureTuning.title: Nhazi ụkpụrụ ụlọ
architectureTuning.description: A na-enyocha nhazi akụrụngwa nke ndị na-aga ime iji melite arụmọrụ na arụmọrụ ọnụahịa.

continuousOptimization.title: Njikarịcha na-aga n'ihu
continuousOptimization.description: Ọrụ njikarịcha na-agba ọsọ na loops a na-achịkwa na nzaghachi telemetry ka usoro wee gbanwee ka profaịlụ ọchịchọ na-agbanwe.

routeAndLogisticsPlanning.title: Route & Logistics Planning
routeAndLogisticsPlanning.description: Nnyefe dị mgbagwoju anya na atụmatụ izipu na-erite uru site na ọchụchọ evolushọn mgbe ihe mgbochi na-agbanwe ngwa ngwa.

modelAndHyperparameterSearch.title: Model na Hyperparameter Search
modelAndHyperparameterSearch.description: Nchọpụta mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa nwere ike ịchọpụta nhazi ụdị dị elu mgbe ebumnobi na-eme mkpọtụ na nke na-abụghị akara.

portfolioAndAllocationProblems.title: Pọtụfoliyo na Nsogbu Nkesa
portfolioAndAllocationProblems.description: Njikarịcha n'okpuru asọmpi mgbaru ọsọ nwere ike framed dị ka mma tradeoffs gafee evolving nwa akwukwo tent.
